title: Dino Rumble
description: A very expansive and  quality dino mod adding food items bosses and more!
body:
This adds t rexes brontos and more dinosaurs, introducing weapons and weapon smiths, a new biome, new ores, and craftable weapons from dinosaurs. This is the first mod i created.
![ptero](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86d2ad29ad081916ab15b3626113723eb5b25251.png)

Needs geckolib
